title: End-to-End Hierarchical Binary Workflow
text: article presents approved Bernoulli-logit workflow binary trial-level outcomes repeated observations, participant effects, optional crossed item effects. interface deliberately restricted: users supply arbitrary formula, likelihood, backend, Stan program, automatic model-selection rule. core contract, simulation, preparation, model specification, prior predictive check require Bayesian backend.

title: gp3bayes
text: package currently provides: explicit contracts model-readiness audits; deterministic binary positive-duration simulation stored truth; recorded outcome, condition, unit, missing-value, scaling decisions; inspectable backend-independent prior specifications prior checks; restricted Bernoulli-logit lognormal formula construction; optional full-MCMC fitting fixed brms rstan route; R-hat, bulk/tail ESS, divergence, treedepth, energy diagnostics; posterior summaries family-specific posterior predictive checks; prior-scale sensitivity simulation-based parameter recovery; conservative structured reporting without automatic adequacy claims. initial development scope restricted : hierarchical Bernoulli-logit models binary trial-level outcomes; hierarchical lognormal models strictly positive uncensored durations. Core contract, validation, simulation, preparation, specification, prior-predictive functionality require Gazepoint hardware, Gazepoint exports, gp3tools, proprietary software, private data, Bayesian backend. Binary fitting requires optional brms rstan packages.

Added initial deterministic scope test using testthat edition 3. Added MIT licence. Added standard GitHub Actions workflows cross-platform R CMD check pkgdown deployment. Added canonical repository, issue-tracker, pkgdown website metadata. Added create_model_contract() two approved initial model families neutral column mappings explicit methodological specifications. Added audit_model_readiness() backend-independent assessment outcome validity, declared columns, missingness, repeated measurements, item trial structure, predictors, interactions, time terms, requested participant-level random slopes. Added concise print methods deterministic validation tests formulas, priors, compatibility checks, complete specifications. Added simulate_hierarchical_binary_data() deterministic hierarchical Bernoulli-logit simulation participant effects, optional crossed item effects, optional participant condition slopes, controlled imbalance, stored true-parameter record. Added concise print methods, generated documentation, 89 focused tests backend-independent binary workflow foundation. Added repository installed-package citation metadata CITATION.cff inst/CITATION. Added posterior summaries, binary posterior predictive checks, prior-scale sensitivity, simulation-based recovery, diagnostic plots, structured Markdown model reports. Diagnostic, predictive, sensitivity, recovery statuses never create automatic convergence, adequacy, robustness, validation claims.
